description_long: This is a sealed retail package of Faragello Frozen Broad Beans, featuring a predominantly white and green color scheme. The front of the bag displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with an image of broad beans and green pods, and bilingual labeling in English and Arabic. The back of the package contains detailed nutritional information, ingredient lists, and multilingual product descriptions. The sides of the bag are narrow, showing the thickness of the packaging and partial graphics of beans and pods. The packaging appears to be made of flexible plastic, typical for frozen food products, and is likely filled with air to cushion the beans inside. The overall appearance is clean, commercial, and designed for retail freezer display.
description: A sealed plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Broad Beans with a white and green design, brand logo, and images of broad beans. The back features nutritional and product information in multiple languages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, product name, images of broad beans, and bilingual labeling.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and partial graphics of bean pods.
description_view_2: Back view with nutritional facts, ingredient lists, and multilingual product information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's thickness and scattered bean graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a red background with white text and a stylized 'F' above the name.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states 'Frozen Broad Beans' in English and Arabic, with images of green broad beans and pods.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
